title: Gently Crisp Australian Doraji Skewers
description: A kid-friendly Australian dish featuring bellflower root doraji, tempered with chocolate for a unique flavor combination, served in agave leaves for a fun twist.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
Peel and slice the doraji into 1-inch pieces.
Thread the doraji pieces onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Drizzle the olive oil over the doraji and sprinkle with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Temper the dark chocolate by melting it in a double boiler and then cooling it to room temperature.
Drizzle the tempered chocolate over the doraji skewers.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the doraji skewers.
Place the skewers in the agave leaves and serve immediately.
Bake the skewers in the preheated oven for 10 minutes, or until gently crisp.
